scripts.prepare:desktop-assets: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; if (Test-Path 'backend') { Remove-Item 'backend' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction Stop }; Copy-Item '..\dist-windows\back-end-gest-o' 'backend' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction Stop"
scripts.rebuild:backend-native: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:npm_config_runtime='electron'; $env:npm_config_target='37.10.3'; $env:npm_config_disturl='https://electronjs.org/headers'; Push-Location backend; npm rebuild better-sqlite3; Pop-Location; Remove-Item Env:npm_config_runtime,Env:npm_config_target,Env:npm_config_disturl -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
scripts.build:dir: npm run build:icon && npm run prepare:assets && npm run prepare:desktop-assets && npm run rebuild:backend-native && npx @electron/packager . "IGA Gestao" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=release --overwrite --icon=../installer/assets/logo.ico --prune=true --ignore="^/release$|^/scripts$"
